title: Android 11: Better messaging & controls
description:
Introducing Android 11
Powerful device controls and easier ways to manage conversations and your privacy.

Your device will be updated to Android 11. Learn more at android.com/11.

New features include:
- Improved device & media controls
- Manage your conversations in one place
- Built-in screen recording
- More privacy controls

Downloading updates over a mobile network or while roaming may cause additional charges.
